description: You are the store administrator for Urban Electronics, a Drupal Commerce store at http://localhost (admin / Admin1234!). Correct the following discrepancies identified in a pricing audit: update the retail price of 'Bose QuietComfort Ultra Earbuds' (SKU: BOSE-QCUE) to $279.00 and the 'WD Black SN850X 2TB NVMe SSD' (SKU: WD-SN850X-2TB) to $129.99. Change the SKU for 'Corsair Vengeance DDR5 32GB RAM Kit' (currently 'CORSAIR-DDR5-32G') to 'CORSAIR-DDR5-32GB'. For the 'Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones' (SKU: SONY-WH1000XM5), set the list price to $399.99 while ensuring the selling price remains $348.00. Unpublish the 'Anker PowerCore 26800mAh Portable Charger' to remove it from the storefront.
